creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=9dc9eb71e509c136098ed08eff0294eeb2a226e6

commit 9dc9eb71e509c136098ed08eff0294eeb2a226e6
Author:     Adriaan de Groot <adridg@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2022-01-17 18:31:25 +0000
Commit:     Adriaan de Groot <adridg@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2022-01-21 21:41:06 +0000

    print/scribus-devel: switch to C++17 for upcoming poppler

    This is a fix-it-before-it-breaks commit. Upcoming poppler requires
    consumers to build as C++17. Switch to that, and pull in an
    upstream patch that fixes the Scribus build in C++17.

    PR:     260956

 print/scribus-devel/Makefile                       |  8 +++--
 ...e8142844a7ee70ddff95253d0299896bcc16.diff (new) | 38 ++++++++++++++++++++++
 2 files changed, 43 insertions(+), 3 deletions(-)
